subcodes.first_line: Convey to the honored mother, that near handmaiden of God, on behalf of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, the most exalted and resplendent greetings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امه الله المقربه والده محترمه را از قبل عبدالبهاء تحیت ابدع ابهی ابلاغ دارید
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
